titleStmt.title: SII 15.16: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 16. (B.K. No. 450 of 1926.) MADANBHĀVI, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Rāmaliṅga temple.

The inscription contains two dates. The first is Chālukya-Vikrama year 52, Kāḷayukti, Kārttika śu. 10, Monday. The date is defective. The details correspond to 1138 A.D., October 15, the weekday being Saturday. But, for Kāḷayukti, the Chālukya-Vikrama year would be 62. The second is Pramādi, Māgha-amāvāsye, Sunday, solar eclipse, corresponding to 1134 A.D., January 27. The week-day, however, was Saturday. This date is earlier than the first one by four years.

It records a gift of land to the god Svayaṁbhu Kalidēva of Mandūr by Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Jayakēśi II of the Kadamba family of Goa. Jayakēśi whose usual Kadamba praśasti is recounted and who is mentioned as Koṅkaṇa-chakravarti, is said to have been ruling the kingdom from Bhōgūru with his crowned queen Maiḷaladēvī, Yuvarāja Permāḍi and prince Vijayāditya. The gift was made after visiting the said place as a consummation of his vow of observing the Mondays.

On the second date is registered a gift of income from the Pannāya tax on the god's garden in favour of the above deity by Suṅkada-pergaḍe Śankarayya-nāyaka. Some more gifts are mentioned in the earlier lines of the epigraph which are much damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namaḥ śivāya
worn out
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsipuravarādhīśvara samastabhuvanasaṁstūyamānaharadharaṇī pra
sūta triḷōcanakadaṁbavaṁśamahōdayaṁ nija
pratāpavaśīkritasakaḷamahīmaṁḍaḷa
śīti nagarādhiṣṭhitāṣṭādaśāśvamēdha
damaged
cūḍāmaṇītyakhiḷarājāvaḷī
dhīśvara koṁkaṇacakravartti śrī yakēśi
damaged
gaḷu duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapra
ḍinoḷu vijayarājya
nāthi
ṣṭhāyaka śatānandamukunda �kā
bhīṣṭaphaḷadāyaka pratya raṁgabhōgenai
vēdyādi samasta pūjā geṟeyēri
yiṁ paḍuvalirdda gaddeyu yalaya yeletō
ṭamumanūriṁ mūḍaṇa nivē �mūḍa
ṇōreya hūdōṁṭada bayalu yama
dhyānadhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭhā śrīsvayaṁ bhūdē
va pādārādhakarumappa pūrvvakaṁ mā
ḍi biṭṭaru mattaṁ caitra pavitraveraḍakke gadyāṇa 1 perggeḍe paṇa
sēnabōva paṇa 1 Aṁgaḍiyalli karmmāṟaṁ pāga 2
maḍivāḷaṁ pāga 2 talligaralli mane biṭṭaru mayvaga 2
gātrada darśa� pāga 1 haḍige talevoṁ tōṭa pāga 2 leyalli ndara paṇa 1
Intinitāyamaṁ sama ṇḍugaḷu tamirddu sarvvanamaśyadiṁ sarvvabā
dhāparihāra māḍi koṭṭaru mattamīdharmmaṁ I relu . svasti samastarājāvaḷī virājitarappa koṁkaṇa
cakravartti jayakēsidēvarasaruṁ paṭṭamahādēvi maiḷalamahādēviyaruṁ yuva rāja permmāḍidēvanuṁ
vijayādityakumāra sahitaṁ bhōgūranelevīḍinoḷu sukasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamirddu .
cāḷukyavikramakālada 52 neya kāḷayukti saṁvatsarada kārttika śu 10 sōma vāradandu mandūra svayaṁ
bhu kalidēvarallige sōmavārada vāriyāgirdda bratōdyāpanasamayadoḷu bandu dēvaraṁgabhōgakke mugu
ḷiya holasīme mandūra holasīme mēreyāgire ṇa bhūmiyoḷu hiriyakōlalāṟu
mattaru bhūmiyaṁ sarbbabādhāparihāramāgi biṭṭaru [Intī dharmmamaṁ] svadharmmanāvanōrvvaṁ prapāḷisidaṁ
ge gaṁge gaye kēdāra vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāgayeṁba mahātīrtthaṁgaḷa taḍiyoḷu sāyira kavileya
kōḍukoḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnaṁgaḷoḷu kaṭṭisi caturvvēdapāragarappa sāyira sabrāhma ṇargga koṭṭa mahāphaḷavakku .
Intī dharmavanāvanōrvvanaḷidavaṁganituṁ tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāyirakavileyaṁ sāyira sa brāhmaṇaranaḷida paṁcamahā
pātakamakku . ślōka . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁndharāṁ ṣaṣṭhiṁ varṣasahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhiḥ sagarādhibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ .
kandha . paramasvayaṁbhukalidēvarigī śāsanamanesaye tāṁ māḍisidaṁ varaguṇanidhi negarda saṁkara bammeya nāyakaṁ
kṛtārtthaṁ jagadoḷ . rūvārikumudacaṁdraṁ bhāvakarūvārivārijakkaṁ mattaṁ rūvārivārijōbbhavanī vasumatiyoḷagati
pracaṇḍaṁ cauṇḍa . v® . sale maṁdūra gavuṇḍanākaṇiya cauvuṇḍaṁge satputranī baladēvaṁ śivapādapadmamadhupaṁ mandūroḷaṁ śaṁbhuvī kali
dēvaṁgatibhaktiyinde besageydī śāsanaṁ nilke tāṁ nelanuṁ nēsaṟumuḷḷinaṁ tolagadinnā caṁdratāraṁbaraṁ . © .
mattaṁ pramādi saṁvatsarada māghadamavāsya Ādivāra sūryyagrahaṇadandu mandūra śrī svayaṁbhudē
vara nandādīvigegaṁ caitrapavitrakkaṁ śrīmatu suṁkada perggaḍe śaṁkarayyanāyakaru dēvara tōṭada kuḷiya
suṁka baṭṭe pannāyamaṁ sarvvanamasyamāgi biṭṭarintī dharmmamaṁ suṁkamaṁ paḍedadhikāri gaḷsaddharmmadiṁ naḍeyisu[varu .]
Digital edition of SII 15.16 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
